titles.title: Your Grace Has Been Keeping Me

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I remember, times when I would have given up I remember, moments I would have lay down my cross In all the trials, temptations all sorrows I know Your Grace has been keeping me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So I can't turn back, There's Something inside that's keeping me I'd been beyond the veil, I've seen Your Glory. And I don't want to go back, to where I used to be I know Your Grace, I know Your Grace has been keeping me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We're living satan's eden, a world of darkness would be So time's it's hard to see, we were meant to be Lord you have given me, Your Spirit and Your Mercy And if it wasn't of Your Grace, I know where I would be.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I know I'm a sinner, saved by Your Grace It's nothing I had done, nothing I deserved But Lord You given me, Your Life abundantly And I will always be, amazed by Your Grace.
